3 Value Stocks We Steer Clear Of Value stocks typically trade at discounts to the broader market, offering patient investors the opportunity to buy businesses when they’re out of favor. The key risk, however, is that these stocks are usually cheap for a reason – five cents for a piece of fruit may seem like a great deal until you find out it’s rotten.

ColdTrack Named to Inc. 5000 for Fifth Consecutive Year, Cementing Its Status as a National Growth Leader NEW YORK, August 12, 2025--ColdTrack, the leading provider of fulfillment and software services purpose-built for cold and frozen eCommerce brands, today announced it secured a ranking on the 2025 Inc. 5000 list of the fastest-growing private companies in America. By securing a spot on the 2025 list, ColdTrack has reached a milestone fewer than 1% of companies have achieved, according to Enterprise Knowledge: being recognized on the Inc. 5000 for five consecutive years.

F&I Sentinel Named to Inc. 5000 List of Fastest-Growing Private Companies in America for Third Straight Year F&I Sentinel, the leader in tech-enabled solutions for finance and insurance products (F&I) to the automotive finance industry, is proud to announce its inclusion on the esteemed Inc. 5000 list of fastest-growing companies for the third straight year. F&I Sentinel ranked #1,931 on the 2025 list and #117 in the financial services industry as a whole, a big jump from its place on the 2024 list and a clear indication of the company's unwavering commitment to innovation and excellence.

RIND Snacks Earns Spot on the Prestigious Inc. 5000 List for Second Consecutive Year RIND® Snacks, the sustainable snack brand on a mission to maximize nutrition and minimize food waste, has been named to the Inc. 5000 list of America's fastest-growing private companies for the second year in a row.
